name: C-15 --paywalled --require-attestation passes when the attestation file exists at compliance/attestations/<id>.yaml
command: mkdir -p compliance/attestations .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch && printf 'attestation: present\n' > compliance/attestations/paywall-src.yaml && printf '2026-05-25T08:00:00Z' > .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/paywall-src.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/freshness-gate.sh" --framework-id paywall-src --fetch-frequency weekly --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --paywalled --require-attestation && echo attested 1>&2
